# @codenhub/tauri-plugin-webview

> Experimental Tauri v2 frontend package for creating and controlling
> `WebviewWindow` instances. Navigation and reload require the shipped companion
> Rust commands; all operations require appropriate Tauri capabilities.

Use this package only from bundled frontend code in a Tauri WebView. Treat URLs
as security-sensitive and verify behavior on every target platform.

## Documentation

- [Documentation overview](docs/index.md): Scope, status, artifacts, and routes
  to complete documentation.
- [API and runtime reference](docs/reference.md): All exports, lifecycle,
  platform constraints, and failures.
- [Tauri setup and security](docs/setup.md): Rust registration, permissions,
  IPC, and trust boundaries.
